title: Sentry Issue Structure
description: Structural documentation for the Sentry Issue resource — the core entity representing an aggregation of similar error events

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique numeric identifier for the issue (as a string)

fields.name: shortId
fields.description: Human-readable short identifier in ORG-NNN format, e.g. MYORG-42

fields.name: title
fields.description: Issue title composed of the exception type and message

fields.name: culprit
fields.description: Module or function identified as the root cause

fields.name: permalink
fields.description: Direct URL to the issue in the Sentry web UI

fields.name: logger
fields.description: Logger name that captured the error

fields.name: level
fields.description: Severity level of the issue

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current triage status of the issue

fields.name: isPublic
fields.description: Whether the issue is shared publicly via permalink

fields.name: platform
fields.description: SDK platform string (python, javascript, java, dotnet, go, ruby, etc.)

fields.name: project
fields.description: Reference to the Sentry project the issue belongs to

fields.name: type
fields.description: Issue type category

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Issue-type-specific metadata

fields.name: type
fields.description: Exception class name

fields.name: value
fields.description: Exception message text

fields.name: filename
fields.description: Source filename

fields.name: function
fields.description: Function or method name

fields.name: numComments
fields.description: Number of comments on this issue

fields.name: userCount
fields.description: Number of distinct users who experienced this issue

fields.name: count
fields.description: Total event count (returned as string for large numbers)

fields.name: firstSeen
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the first event for this issue

fields.name: lastSeen
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent event

fields.name: assignedTo
fields.description: The user or team assigned to this issue

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Tag aggregations for this issue (browser, environment, release, etc.)

fields.name: stats
fields.description: Event count statistics keyed by period ('24h', '14d'). Values are arrays of [timestamp, count] pairs.

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Issue priority level

fields.name: isSubscribed
fields.description: Whether the current user is subscribed to notifications for this issue

fields.name: isBookmarked
fields.description: Whether the current user has bookmarked this issue
